name: Cochrane CD012942_pub2 analysis 1: Comparison 1 All antidepressants versus placebo, Outcom
citation: Cochrane review CD012942_pub2 (DOI 10.1002/14651858.CD012942.pub2). Generic inverse-variance (effect+SE as pre-computed by Cochrane; HR/OR/MD) data extracted via Pairwise70/cochrane-data-extractor; reference = metafor rma (REML) from pairwise70 ma4_metafor_validation.csv.
note: Engine PM reproduces the metafor pooled estimate to <0.005 on this real Cochrane dataset. GIV = generic inverse-variance: studies carry effect+SE on the analysis scale (difference-scale, not exponentiated). Re-verify against the source review forest plot before external citation.
